texto: I write little quotes all the time to help encourage people to come together, like this one: 'If fate happens to toss you a lightbulb, use it to light the path of others, for they will use theirs to light the path of you. With your light together with mine, it's two times as bright and twice as strong.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Matthew Underwood: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I write little quotes all the time to help encourage people to come together, like this one: 'If …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que coragem, light, strong pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de strong e path.

frase_original: I write little quotes all the time to help encourage people to come together, like this one: 'If fate happens to toss you a lightbulb, use it to light the path of others, for they will use theirs to light the path of you. With your light together with mine, it's two times as bright and twice as strong.'
